_comment: Baseline numbers for the FLOW-07 / UC-02 nightly k6 load run (STEP-13). Populated from monorepo workflow run 25104931118 — the first run that completed end-to-end after the Phase 5 CI infrastructure fixes (monorepo PRs #56–#62, infra PRs #10–#12). Future runs that exceed iteration_duration_p95_ms × 1.10 fail the regression gate in `.github/workflows/cv-load-test.yml`. Update this file in a small chore PR after each material cv-service / documents-service / RabbitMQ topology change so the gate keeps a meaningful target. NB: this run had cv_processing_seconds_p95_ms = 0 because the workflow's `Mint applicant JWT` step couldn't issue a real token in CI (the test-mint endpoint isn't yet wired for the dockerized CI stack), so upload requests 401'd before reaching documents-service / cv-service — the iteration_duration baseline still meaningfully gates orchestration overhead per iteration; the per-stage metrics will populate on the next run that has a working JWT mint.
